results.title: Ruler - Apps on Google Play
results.content:
Flag inappropriate
 Show review history

April 16, 2019

The only problem with this app is I can't find a way to adjust the position of zero. The screen on my Samsung Galaxy S9 has rounded corners, making it difficult to accurately line up the zero mark, since it's 1/4" (3/8" with my case) from the edge of the phone. I want to move zero from the edge to the point where the curve in the corner straightens. If that setting is added, then I will change my rating to five stars. Oh, and pay no mind to Ivan Overmoyer. He needs to learn how to put his phone's auto-rotate toggle in easy reach, and realize there are good uses for the ruler in both portrait and landscape modes, LOL.

104 people found this review helpful

HUGE MOOD

Aaron Pinder

November 13, 2024

Great and reliable ruler app. Well put together, no distracting content. Keep in mind though, before using the ruler you need to calibrate to get accurate results. This isn't the developer's fault, but some phones don't report accurate DPI settings, so in order to get accurate distances, calibration is needed. It's easy to calibrate in the app though so it's not really a problem. Props to the developer!

results.title: Screen Ruler | ScreenRuler
results.content:
## Version History

Read the changelog to see changes in each version.

## Feedback and Support

Please leave a feedback on Sourceforge, on AlternativeTo or anywhere else. Thank you!

Places to get help:

 Ask on Sourceforge (General help, ideas etc.)
 Open an issue on GitHub (Bugs, feature requests etc.)

## Contribute

You are very welcome to support the development of this app by reporting bugs, adding fixes, translating or suggesting new features. The easiest way to contribute is to open pull request on GitHub.

#### Contributors

These great people have contributed to this project: [...] > Keyboard Actions:  
>  Space - Switch ruler mode between horizontal, vertical and two-dimensional.  
>  Z - Select a window to measure. Cancel with ‘Esc’.  
>  Arrow keys - Move the ruler by one pixel.  
>  Shift + Arrow keys - Move the ruler by one medium step (defaults to 5px).  
>  Ctrl + Arrow keys - Resize the ruler by one pixel.  
>  Ctrl + Shift + Arrow keys - Resize the ruler by one medium step (defaults to 5px).  
>  Alt + Arrow keys - Dock the ruler to screen boundaries.  
>  Ctrl + C - Copy current length to clipboard.  
>  L - Set marker at current length.  
>  C - Remove the first custom marking line.  
>  Esc - Exit Screen Ruler, window selection or help.  
>  See more keyboard actions in context menu.
>
> Mouse Actions: [...] Screen Ruler is a lightweight and configurable ruler tool for Windows Desktop. It allows you to measure the size of elements on the screen in different units, including pixels, centimeters and inches. Measuring is possible either using a two-dimensional, rectangular ruler scale or a one-dimensional, horizontal or vertical scale. The ruler can be moved and resized precisely using either the mouse or the keyboard and custom marking lines can be added. Besides coming with a light and a dark theme, Screen Ruler also allows you to fully customize its appearance by changing all color settings.

## Features

results.title: Screen Ruler download | SourceForge.net
results.content:
In my work I often have to measure wall areas to estimate material need from drawings, and the architects never include all the measurements, never mind my requests and complaints, or give a cad picture where I could measure lengths easier. I had even resigned to forever having the same nuisance every time, to try get a reading with a scale ruler and calculator from the monitor, until I found this wonderful app. It does everything for me, saving me countless hours of useless grind. Thank you! I'd give you a hug and kiss if I could, but I'll have to settle for a donation.
 yanwoo  Edited 2024-10-05

  Useful apps. Set : >Calibrate Ruler >Manual >Hor scaling >141 DPI (in my case / Acer an515-58) Calibrate using physical ruler and it's quite precise. Thank you developers 👍 [...] features 1 of 5 2 of 5 3 of 5 4 of 5 5 of 5  4 / 5
